news_items.headline: Astros closer Hader off IL, ready for '26 debut
news_items.summary: All-Star closer Josh Hader was reinstated from the 60-day injured list by the Astros after sitting out all season, providing a major boost for their bullpen.

news_items.headline: Castellanos on return to Philly: Had highs, lows
news_items.summary: Padres outfielder Nick Castellanos acknowledged his four years in Philadelphia had highs and lows on Tuesday.

news_items.headline: Naylor not in Mariners lineup day after early exit...
news_items.summary: Mariners 1B Josh Naylor, who exited Monday night's victory over the Mets with back spasms, was out of the lineup Tuesday.

news_items.headline: Cabrera, Boyd close to returning to Cubs' rotation...
news_items.summary: Edward Cabrera and Matthew Boyd are close to returning to the banged-up rotation for the Chicago Cubs after being sidelined by injuries.

news_items.headline: MLBPA sees clear distance from MLB in CBA talks
news_items.summary: Bruce Meyer, interim executive director and lead negotiator for MLBPA, believes -- after viewing what MLB proposed -- there's a clear sign of the distance between the two sides just six months before the current collective bargaining agreement expires.
